title: Earthworm Tractors
writer: Richard Macaulay, Joe Traub, Hugh Cummings
actors: Joe E. Brown, June Travis, Guy Kibbee
plot: Alexander Botts is a self-described natural born salesman and master mechanic, who is trying to make a big sale of Earthworm tractors to grouchy lumberman Johnson. Since Botts doesn't really know anything about tractors, and since...
